title: PrimitiveMobsRevival
description: The classic primitive mobs mod, ported to 1.20.1 with some small changes.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/488ab66f58bfe1d913c191d1c574c1f18e18f4a1.png)

The classic Primitive Mobs Mod, lastly updated in 2019 gets a revival for one of the more popular and uptodate versions. Includes mayority of the original mobs and its textures, although some behaviors have been modified.

This project is in no way associated to the original Primitive Mobs Mod or its creator Daveyx0, feel free to visit the original project page: [Original Mod Post](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/primitive-mobs)

This is completely a passion project that aims to provide the classical feel of this mod for modern Minecraft Versions.
